# Third-Party Libraries (Vendors)

This directory contains vendored third-party dependencies used by the Loom Client.
We extend our massive thanks to the incredible open-source developers who make these tools possible.

Below is the manifest of all included libraries, their authors, and their respective licenses.

---

### [Dear ImGui](https://github.com/ocornut/imgui)
* **Author:** [ocornut](https://github.com/ocornut)
* **License:** MIT
* **Description:** Bloat-free graphical user interface library for C++. Powers the entire Loom visual menu.
* **Version:** v1.92.6
* **Note:** Vendored directly as raw `.cpp` and `.h` files.

---

### License Compliance
*All libraries in this folder retain their original copyright notices and licenses. If a library requires its raw `LICENSE` file to be distributed alongside the binary/source, it can be found within its respective subdirectory.*
